title: Week 9 Release Readiness — 0.1.0 Proof
description: End-to-end proof of Week 9 capabilities: isolated sessions, run command, isolation-aware doctor diagnostics, and renderer/export artifacts.

artifacts.description: Reviewer-facing narrative explaining what Week 9 functionality was proven and what limitations were observed
Reproducible capture script for recreating the Week 9 release-readiness bundle
Step-by-step exit-code ledger for capture, artifact copies, review-page generation, validation, and formatting checks
Doctor JSON envelope showing home isolation and browser cache accessibility checks under an isolated home
Bundle-local JSON mirror of the doctor output used by validator/review tooling
Initial inspect output for the isolated session immediately after creation
Run-command JSON envelope for the Week 9 proof banner command
Run-command JSON envelope for the in-session system-information command
Renderer wait result proving the terminal frame was stable before capture
